_comment: MAP-AGNOSTIC TEST: convert FS22 West End (64x, by Levis) -> FS25 as WE25. Different author => different scene-group names (WestEnd/Trees/forest/gameplay, NOT WW's WildWest/roads/Buildings/trees), so the RASTER core (terrain/farmland/texture/foliage) ports via this config but the SCENE-GRAPH tools (flats/buildings/trees/lights) need per-map group-name mapping (see 'scene_groups' TODO).

scene_groups._note: West End (Levis) - different author/names than WW. top = its 4 top groups; trees = Trees+forest. roads/buildings/lights sit inside the mixed WestEnd mega-group under unknown subgroup names -> [] = let classify.py content-detect them.

material_remaps._note: TBD once West End's unshipped-texture materials are enumerated.

tree_palette._note: US palette (same as WW for now; Levis West End is US midwest). Tune per-map if needed.

field_fixups._note: FS22 put multiple fields on one farmland parcel; FS25 keeps one field per farmland. merge=union these field numbers into ONE field on a new farmland (bridge_m closes headland gaps); split=each field gets its own new farmland; owned=true makes the new parcel starter-owned (defaultFarmProperty). The original shared parcel is cleared entirely. Handled by ww_fields.resolve_fields (build_fields + build_farmland).

ground_layer_map._note: West End (mapUS) weight-mask layer -> FS25 engine terrain layer. grass stays the engine's full base; these paint on top. dirt = the starter-farm dirt roads/yard. Keys match the *_weight.png prefixes (case-sensitive).

flats._note: Per-map road-shape filter for build_flats content-detect. only_prefixes keeps only names starting with these; skip_prefixes drops matches. Absent = keep everything (WW default). ISOLATION: bringing roads back surface-only (asphalt), LODs excluded.
